prompt: I'm a WeAreRLadies RoCur admin and someone just signed up to curate. What are the steps to onboard them?
assertions: Says to add them to the curator schedule promptly
Says to save their photo to the Google Drive named YYYY-MM-DD-firstname (week's Monday)
Says to email a confirmation of their curation week (Email 1)
Says to update the Airtable admin checklist
Says that ~1 week before, draft their intro graphic from the Canva RoCur brand template and send for approval
Says that the Sunday before, rotate/generate the Bluesky app password and send it
